tasks.title: Fix path redaction regex being overly aggressive
evidence: sanitize.go:22-33 - Path redaction regex is overly aggressive
Legitimate URL paths like /api/v1/users get redacted, making debugging harder
plan: Refine regex to only redact sensitive paths (auth, tokens, keys, secrets)
Add tests for common legitimate paths that should NOT be redacted
tasks.request: scan finding: path redaction too aggressive hurts debugging

tasks.title: Add config validation warnings for invalid env vars
evidence: config.go:78-103 - No validation warnings for invalid env vars
Invalid values silently fall back to defaults without warning the user
plan: Add warning logs for invalid environment variable values
Include the invalid value and what default is being used
tasks.request: scan finding: invalid env vars silently use defaults
